_comments.enabled: Feature flag - set to true to enable position strength calculations in preseason ratings
_comments.weights: Position group weights (must sum to 1.0) - reflects relative importance of each position to team success
_comments.max_bonus: Maximum bonus points contribution to preseason rating (base 1500 + other bonuses + this)
_comments.top_players_per_position: Number of top recruits to consider when calculating position group strength

rationale.QB_30_percent: Quarterback is most valuable position in college football
rationale.OL_DL_45_percent: Line play (OL + DL) determines game outcomes - games won in trenches
rationale.DB_15_percent: Secondary coverage critical in modern passing game
rationale.skill_positions_low: RB/WR/TE less predictive - scheme-dependent, coaching impact greater
rationale.LB_moderate: Important but less impactful than DL or DB in modern spread offenses

_comments.tuning_strategy: Import 3-5 seasons of historical data, correlate position strength with end-of-season ELO, adjust weights to maximize correlation
